jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Oliveboard
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
